message: 🌱 Add open-policy-agent-opa-: Load multiple policy bundles mission (#576)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "open-policy-agent-opa-721-load-multiple-policy-bundles",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "open-policy-agent-opa-: Load multiple policy bundles",
+    "description": "Load multiple policy bundles. Requested by 14+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current open-policy-agent-opa- deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your open-policy-agent-opa- version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-\nhelm list -n open-policy-agent-opa- 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working open-policy-agent-opa- installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review open-policy-agent-opa- configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant open-policy-agent-opa- configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-\nkubectl get configmap -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=open-policy-agent-opa-\n```\nI'm trying to find a way to load policies from different bundles into the same OPA instance. So far I was unable to do so as you can only specify 1 bundle in the config file (https://www.openpolicyagent.org/docs/bundles.html)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Load multiple policy bundles",
+        "description": "This change brings in support for multiple bundles to be downloaded\nand activated OPA.\n\nThis is enabled by using the new config option `bundles` to define\nthe bundles, and deprecates the older `bundle` option.\n\nThe new `bundles` keyword and structure is propagated through to the\ndecision logs,\n```yaml\nservices:\n  acmecorp:\n    url: https://example.com/service/v1\n\nbundle:\n  name: authz/bundle.tar.gz\n  prefix: somedir\n  service: acmecorp\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-\nkubectl get events -n open-policy-agent-opa- --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Load multiple policy bundles\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This change brings in support for multiple bundles to be downloaded\nand activated OPA.\n\nThis is enabled by using the new config option `bundles` to define\nthe bundles, and deprecates the older `bundle` option.\n\nThe new `bundles` keyword and structure is propagated through to the\ndecision logs, status API, provenance, stored manifests, etc. Check\nout the doc changes for all the updated structures.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "services:\n  acmecorp:\n    url: https://example.com/service/v1\n\nbundle:\n  name: authz/bundle.tar.gz\n  prefix: somedir\n  service: acmecorp",
+        "services:\n  acmecorp:\n    url: https://example.com/service/v1\n  hooli:\n    url: https://hooli.com/service/\n\nbundle:\n  name: authz/bundle.tar.gz\n  prefix: somedir\n  service: acmecorp",
+        "services:\n  acmecorp:\n    url: https://example.com/service/v1\n  hooli:\n    url: https://hooli.com/service/\n\nbundles:\n  authz/bundle.tar.gz:\n    resource: somedir/authz/bundle.tar.gz\n    service: acmecorp\n  hooli-bundle:\n    resource: somedir/authz/bundle.tar.gz\n    service: hooli"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "open-policy-agent-opa-",
+      "graduated",
+      "security",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "open-policy-agent-opa-"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/open-policy-agent/opa/issues/721",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/open-policy-agent/opa",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/open-policy-agent/opa/pull/1566"
+    },
+    "reactions": 14,
+    "comments": 12,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with open-policy-agent-opa- installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-11T03:03:49.173Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
